briefdescription.para: CS main and sub mode to be used during the CS procedure.
Number of main mode steps taken from the end of the last CS subevent to be repeated at the beginning of the current CS subevent directly after the last mode-0 step of that event.
Number of CS mode-0 steps at the beginning of the test CS subevent.
CS Test role.
RTT variant.
CS_SYNC PHY.
Antenna identifier to be used for CS_SYNC packets.
CS subevent length in microseconds.

detaileddescription.para: Range: 1250us to 4s

briefdescription.para: Gap between the start of two consecutive CS subevents (N * 0.625 ms)

detaileddescription.para: A value of 0 means that there is only one CS subevent.

briefdescription.para: Maximum allowed number of subevents in the procedure.

detaileddescription.para: A value of 0 means that this parameter is ignored.

briefdescription.para: Desired TX power level for the CS procedure.

detaileddescription.para: Value range is BT_HCI_OP_LE_CS_MIN_MAX_TX_POWER to BT_HCI_OP_LE_CS_MAX_MAX_TX_POWER.

Special values:
BT_HCI_OP_LE_CS_TEST_MAXIMIZE_TX_POWER tells the controller it should use as high a transmit power as possible
BT_HCI_OP_LE_CS_TEST_MINIMIZE_TX_POWER tells the controller it should use as low a transmit power as possible

briefdescription.para: Interlude time in microseconds between the RTT packets.

detaileddescription.para:
Valid options are:
10 us
20 us
30 us
40 us
50 us
60 us
80 us
145 us

briefdescription.para: Interlude time in microseconds between the CS tones.

detaileddescription.para:
Valid options are:
10 us
20 us
30 us
40 us
50 us
60 us
80 us
145 us

briefdescription.para: Time in microseconds for frequency changes.

detaileddescription.para:
Valid options are:
15 us
20 us
30 us
40 us
50 us
60 us
80 us
100 us
120 us
150 us

briefdescription.para: Time in microseconds for the phase measurement period of the CS tones.

detaileddescription.para:
Valid options are:
10 us
20 us
40 us

briefdescription.para: Time in microseconds for the antenna switch period of the CS tones.

detaileddescription.para:
Valid options are:
0 us
1 us
2 us
4 us
10 us

briefdescription.para: Antenna Configuration Index used during antenna switching during the tone phases of CS steps.
Initiator SNR control options.
Reflector SNR control options.
Determines octets 14 and 15 of the initial value of the DRBG nonce.
Override configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This parameter is used to override CS parameters from the DRBG. Each bit configures a different set of parameters.
All overrides are optional, except for those configured by bit 0.

These are:
Bit 0 set: Override using list of channels
Bit 0 not set: Override using channel map
Bit 2 set: Override main mode steps
Bit 3 set: Override T_PM_Tone_Ext
Bit 4 set: Override tone antenna permutation
Bit 5 set: Override CS_SYNC AA
Bit 6 set: Override SS marker positions
Bit 7 set: Override SS marker value
Bit 8 set: Override CS_SYNC payload pattern and user payload
Bit 10 set: Procedure is replaced with a stable phase test

briefdescription.para: Number of times the channels indicated by the channel map or channel field are cycled through for non-mode-0 steps within a CS procedure.
override config bit 0.
Override config bit 2.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: Override config bit 3.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: Override config bit 4.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: Access Address used in CS_SYNC packets sent by the initiator.
Access Address used in CS_SYNC packets sent by the reflector.
Override config bit 5.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: Bit number where the first marker in the channel sounding sequence starts.

detaileddescription.para: Must be between 0 and 28 when using BT_CONN_LE_CS_RTT_TYPE_32_BIT_SOUNDING.

briefdescription.para: Bit number where the second marker in the channel sounding sequence starts.

detaileddescription.para: Must be between 67 and 92 when using BT_CONN_LE_CS_RTT_TYPE_96_BIT_SOUNDING.
A value of BT_HCI_OP_LE_CS_TEST_SS_MARKER_2_POSITION_NOT_PRESENT indicates that this sounding sequence or marker is not present.

briefdescription.para: Override config bit 6.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: Value of the Sounding Sequence marker.
Override config bit 7.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: CS_SYNC payload pattern selection.
User payload for CS_SYNC packets.

detaileddescription.para: This parameter is only used when using BT_LE_CS_TEST_OVERRIDE_8_PAYLOAD_PATTERN_USER
The least significant bit corresponds to the most significant bit of the CS payload. When the sequence is less than 16 octets, the least significant octets shall be padded with zeros.

briefdescription.para: Override config bit 8.

detaileddescription.para: These parameters are ignored if the bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: CS Test parameters.
